creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
the device is a mobile phone (samsung i550).

from your analysis it appears that the device is not following standard
protocol procedures. i think the _WARN should stay. turning it into a
_INFO would introduce inconsistency with the other dlci related warnings.

so i guess this PR can be closed.

thanks for your in depth description of the problem.

cheers.
alex

-- 
a13x
